title: Task Comments
excerpt: Is there a way for users to comment on a task? There is a “start conversation” button on the task card but it only seems to open the task and focus on the main “Information” text area. Is there not a separate “comments” …

posts.author: mrhavercamp (mrhavercamp)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way for users to comment on a task? There is a “start conversation” button on the task card but it only seems to open the task and focus on the main “Information” text area. Is there not a separate “comments” or “conversation” area within the Monday dev task?

posts.author: mrhavercamp (mrhavercamp)
posts.cookedHtml:
It seems there is a bug in Monday Dev. The bug is in the Kanban board view. If one clicks on “start conversation” in Kanban board view, it opens the task as described above. If one clicks “start conversation” in “Main Table” view, it opens the task and focusses on the “Updates” tab.

I believe the latter is the correct functionality.
